issue.title: Fix dashboard API performance — inspectDashboardQueue timeout

metadata.evidenceSummary: Dashboard payload no longer spawns the Flow CLI or performs live provider refresh on request. Built-code measurement returned firstMs=69, secondMs=0, firstIssues=19, secondIssues=19. Verification passed: npm run check, npm test, npm run build, npm run smoke:dashboard, npm run readiness:public, flow ledger verify, git diff --check.

metadata.documentationSummary: Dashboard request handling now documents its contract in code and readonly checks: DashboardState depends on a direct FlowWorkRuntime queue reader, avoids child_process/Flow CLI calls, uses a short snapshot cache, and inspectDashboardQueue reads ledger state without live provider refresh.
